title: hydrangea hydrangeoides
intro: Hydrangea hydrangeoides, also known as Bigleaf Hydrangea, is a type of flowering plant native to Asia, characterized by its large, showy white or pink flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, fever, and rheumatic pain. The health benefits of hydrangea include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Hydrangea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in some skincare products due to its antioxidant and soothing properties.
